Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. VERONICA H. GARCIA OF GOINS & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (510) 663-3700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ARTHUR M. EIDELHOCH OF THE LITTLER MENDELSON, P.C., TEL. NO. 677-3152 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT NORCAL, A FORMER CLIENT WHEN HE WAS IN PRIVATE PRACTICE. HE DID NOT REPRESENT NORCAL IN EMPLOYMENT MATTERS AND MATTERS OF THIS KIND AND DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANTS NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS COMPANY AND GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. THE DEFENDANTS POSITION ARE WELL TAKEN AND THE TIME TO VACATE THE RULING HAS RUN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)
